Rung.Comment: Continually Load timeout value to timers

Rung.Text: [MOV(Mach1State.intState,HISTORIAN.MachineState) ,MOV(Mach1State.intMode,HISTORIAN.MachineMode) ,MOV(Mach1State.intStatus,HISTORIAN.MachineStatus) ,[XIC(Bit_Hist_Part_Fail) OTE(HISTORIAN.Part_Failure_Trigger) ,XIC(Bit_Hist_Part_Complete) OTE(HISTORIAN.Part_Complete_Trigger) ,XIC(Bit_Hist_Part_Pass) OTE(HISTORIAN.Part_Pass_Trigger) ] TON(reset_temp_hist_bits,?,?) ,XIC(reset_temp_hist_bits.DN) [OTU(Bit_Hist_Part_Complete) ,OTU(Bit_Hist_Part_Pass) ,OTU(Bit_Hist_Part_Fail) ] ,XIC(Bit_Hist_Matl_Arrived) [OTE(HISTORIAN.PIA_Matl_Arrived) TON(reset_temp_hist_bits1,?,?) ,XIC(reset_temp_hist_bits1.DN) OTU(Bit_Hist_Matl_Arrived) ] ,[XIC(HMI.From_HMI.Calibrate_Camera) OTL(HISTORIAN.Cam_Cal_PB) ,XIC(HISTORIAN.Cam_Cal_PB) [TON(reset_temp_hist_bits2,?,?) ,XIC(reset_temp_hist_bits2.DN) OTU(HISTORIAN.Cam_Cal_PB) ] ] ];
